svg.aria-label: Sprawling AWS org with dozens of accounts, inconsistent guardrails, flat network with implicit trust between VPCs and broad security group rules, resolved by Control Tower Landing Zone bootstrapping mandatory Guardrails with SCPs at OU level forbidding privileged actions org-wide, account factory standardizing baseline, PrivateLink and VPC endpoints replacing IGW exposure under Zero Trust never-trust-always-verify.
svg.title: 2025-05-16: AWS Control Tower Landing Zone, SCP guardrails, Zero Trust network

g.text: Dozens of accounts : no central guardrails :...
Broad 0.0.0.0/0 SG rules : IGW exposed : no SCP...
Shadow accounts bypassing baseline : no tag enforcement :...
CT Landing Zone : SCP OU block
Control Tower Landing Zone bootstraps each new...
SCPs at OU level forbid privileged actions org-wide :...
Service Control Policy deny-list for root, IAM, org-leave...
PrivateLink + VPC endpoints replace IGW exposure...
Never trust always verify per-request : Security Hub...
GuardDuty threat detect : Config rules for drift : IAM...
